description: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Grocery list? It lists a raṭl of sesame oil (sīraj/sayraj), 1/2 raṭl sumac, 1/2 raṭl tahina, a cupful of rice, eggs, a raṭl of linseed oil (zayt ḥār), and several more items. Another entry was added in lighter & thinner characters: 3 ounces of olive oil (zayt ṭayyib)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
